style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A vertical fence runs down the middle. On the inside, a path labelled « AUTORISÉ » passes through a small gate labelled « CONTRÔLES » to a box labelled « SÛR ». On the outside, a path labelled « INFORMATIQUE FANTÔME » runs around the fence, skipping the controls, ending at a box labelled « EXPOSÉ » with a small rust warning mark. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

On the inside, a path labelled « AUTORISÉ » passes through a small gate labelled « CONTRÔLES » to a box labelled « SÛR ». On the outside, a path labelled « INFORMATIQUE FANTÔME » runs around the fence, skipping the controls, ending at a box labelled « EXPOSÉ » with a small rust warning mark.
